mapper.sql: r.review_id, r.user_id, r.movie_id, r.rating, r.contents, r.is_deleted, r.is_blinded, r.is_spoiler, r.like_count, r.review_source, r.review_category_code, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.created_by, r.updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId}
SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.movie_id = #{movieId} AND r.is_deleted = false ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( user_id, movie_id, rating, contents, is_deleted, is_blinded, is_spoiler, like_count, review_source, review_category_code, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{movieId}, #{rating}, #{content}, false, false, #{spoiler}, #{likeCount}, #{reviewSource}, #{reviewCategoryCode}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET is_deleted = false, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET is_blinded = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET is_blinded = false, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE rating IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = false
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE rating IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = false AND created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r
SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_likes (review_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_votes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND helpful = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_votes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND helpful = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_votes (user_id, review_id, helpful, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reviewId}, #{helpful}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE review_votes SET helpful = #{helpful}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_vote_id = #{reviewVoteId}
